content.en:
In order to prevent Aoi and Wei from running away, the Dragon Shadow Ancient Demon did not inform anyone, and let Ye Tian enter the Qinghuan Abyss first, and the other emperor-level ones were notified later before entering.

In this way, Ye Tian rushed over first.

The Abyss of Green Raccoon.

The emperors of the Golden God Department and its affiliated tribes are all cultivating leisurely here.

During this time, they didn't have any battles, and they didn't feel that the dragon tribe had any hope of winning, and they just waited for the end of the 10,000 Ancient Demon Era to win completely.

Somewhere.

The three emperor-level beings have built palaces here, and each of them has a number of king-level and general-level women in the palace, and they are enjoying themselves inside the palace.

For them, there is no hope of breaking through the ancient demon level, it is better to enjoy it in time.

But suddenly.

A surge of power came, and these palaces instantly turned into powder "Nine Twenty-Seven", and they were also killed by this force in seconds, without the power to resist.

"The emperors of the Golden God Department are really enjoying themselves, and they don't have a sense of crisis! That's fine, I guess they will react after killing a lot of emperors!"

Ye Tian once again used the Dapeng technique to leave, killing one emperor after another.

In addition, the emperor-level of the Dragon Disciple Tribe and the affiliated tribes came in, and the Golden God Department naturally knew about the situation.

It's just that they didn't know that Ye Tian had cultivated into the True Lin form, so naturally they weren't too worried.

The first time.

Wei came over, wanting to kill the emperors of the dragon tribe.

......

"A group of ants, dare to fight back, looking for death!"

Wei said coldly.

But soon, his face changed, because he sensed a familiar aura.

"It's God, he still dares to come over, isn't he afraid of being killed by Aoi?"

Wei Dark Road.

He notified Aoi as soon as possible and asked Aoi to come over and kill Ye Tian, he was not Ye Tian's opponent after all.

So, he wanted to run away.

However, Ye Tian stopped him, but he did not enter the True Lin form, even if it was an ordinary state, he could hang and beat the Wei.

"Arrowmu's Blade!"

Ye Tian cast the blade of the Arrowmu, and also blessed it with the power of the rudimentary form of the Ultimate Rule Realm, and cut the Wei into two with one sword.

However, the scarlet has not fallen, but it has been severely damaged.

Just when Ye Tian was about to kill him, Aoi arrived in time and saved Wei.

Both of his body healed, but his injuries did not.

"Hurry up, or the aftermath of the battle might kill you now!" Aoi said.

"Thank you, Brother Aoi!"

Wei thanked and then ran away, but Ye Tian did not intercept him.

He didn't want to kill Wei too much, and killing Wei was not as good as bad for him.

Once they kill the Wei Demon, they will undoubtedly completely anger the Golden Demon Ancient Demon Destroyer, and when this matter passes, they may be attacked and killed by the Ancient Demon level!

And the consequences of killing the other emperors of the Golden God Tribe were not so serious.

That's why he didn't go all out to kill the wreath.

Of course, Aoi this guy, he can't kill either.

There is no way, he has no backers, and several ancient demon levels of the dragon disciple tribe are not his backers, nor is Pleuz.

But it's okay to hit Aoi hard.

Rumble!!!

Aoi immediately entered the second form of the multiple water demon form, and then began to attack Ye Tian.

Ye Tian kept attacking Aoi and slashed it into one after another.

Gradually, a large number of Aoi began to besiege Ye Tian.

It was as if the situation was the same as before, but at this moment, Ye Tian was very calm, and in a thought, he entered the first form of the True Lin Form, the Blue Scale Form.

Ye Tian, who entered the form of Qinglin, showed extremely terrifying strength, and with the armor of Aromu, his defense could easily resist Aoi's attack.

And his Arrow's Blade combined with the power of the Ultimate Rule Realm Prototype could easily bombard his form clones.

And the number of these form clones is limited, and it is impossible to split indefinitely.

In addition, the more doppelgangers there are, the more energy they need to expend, and they can't fight for a long time.

And Ye Tian's attack was too terrifying, the damage to him was great, and the consumption was also great.

"True Lin Form, how is this possible, you didn't know the True Lin Form before, and you have cultivated this special form in such a short time?"

Aoi was shocked.

Ye Tian was too lazy to talk nonsense with Aoi, and frantically attacked his form clone.

Gradually, Aoi's consumption was too great, and some of the form clones couldn't be maintained, and gradually fell apart.

After a while, Aoi was already in absolute decline.

Outside the Abyss of Qinghuan 0....

Some ancient demon-level existences such as the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon also spied through the void, and when they saw that Aoi was about to lose, their faces were extremely ugly.

"How can this be, how can such a demonic emperor be born on the side of the Dragon Disciple Tribe!"

The Golden Slayer Ancient Demon said coldly.

Moreover, Ye Tian originally belonged to his Golden God Ministry, but he turned out to take refuge in the side of the Dragon Disciple Tribe.

It's a pity that they don't dare to disobey the orders of the Lord of Arrow's mother, otherwise they will really intervene immediately.

Wow!

Aoi fled, and he didn't dare to continue fighting, otherwise there would really be a risk of falling.

Ye Tian did not choose to intercept, but began to slaughter the other emperors of the Golden God Sect, these emperors did not know the battle situation, and did not flee for a while.

And when they wanted to escape, the emperors on the side of the dragon tribe began to intercept and fight them.

And Ye Tian easily killed one emperor-level existence after another, and even entered the command headquarters, slaughtering those emperor-level people who had not had time to escape.

Soon after, Qinghuan Zhiyuan could no longer see the emperor level of the Golden God Ministry, and either escaped or was killed.

From then on, the victory of this battle was in favor of the Dragons tribe.

Unless the Golden God Department can find an emperor who is even stronger than Ye Tian, it is not to think of victory.

......

Golden God Department.

Aoi began to say goodbye, "Lord Jin Slayer Ancient Demon, I have to leave 3.2, I am not the opponent of the sky, and I don't want the follow-up reward!"

"Aoi, you really can't defeat that Heavenly Emperor anymore?"

The Golden Slayer Ancient Demon asked.

"It's really not an opponent!" Aoi said helplessly, "The other party at least has the strength of the top twenty of the Emperor Department of the Aluo Mu Abyss, which is much stronger than me, even if I try hard, I can't hurt him!"

With that, Aoi dragged her injured body away.

The Golden Ancient Demon didn't stop Aoi and let him leave, after all, he was not an opponent, and it was impossible to sacrifice himself for the Golden God Ministry!

Moreover, the strength of the Water Yang Department is still above the Golden God Department, and he doesn't dare to offend!

"Golden Slayer Ancient Demon, what should I do now?"

The Golden Slayer Ancient Demon asked.

"I don't know!" said the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon with a shake of his head.
